# Aura | Personal Productivity Sanctuary 🌌

**Aura** is a premium, glassmorphic single-page web application designed to enhance deep focus, structure task management, and track mental well-being. Built entirely with high-performance vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, it runs locally without external database or asset dependencies.

## 🔗 Access the Application

The application is running live on your local machine:
👉 **[http://127.0.0.1:3000](http://127.0.0.1:3000)**

---

## 🛠️ File Structure

The project has been initialized in your workspace:
*   📂 [index.html](file:///C:/Users/NETCOM/agy-cli-projects/index.html) — Structural markup, semantic elements, SVG dashboard graphics.
*   📂 [styles.css](file:///C:/Users/NETCOM/agy-cli-projects/styles.css) — Design system, glassmorphism filters, keyframe-animated floating blobs.
*   📂 [app.js](file:///C:/Users/NETCOM/agy-cli-projects/app.js) — Task controller, local storage synchronization, Pomodoro countdown, and Web Audio API engine.
*   📂 [package.json](file:///C:/Users/NETCOM/agy-cli-projects/package.json) — Configuration for server running on port 3000.

---

## ⚡ Core Features & Implementation

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[index.html] --> B[styles.css: Glassmorphic Layout]
    A --> C[app.js: Application Logic]
    C --> D[Local Storage Persistence]
    C --> E[Web Audio API Synthesizer]
    C --> F[Pomodoro Countdowns]
    C --> G[Kanban Boards]
```

### 1. Web Audio API Ambient Engine 🔊
Unlike standard websites that load large, slow `.mp3` audio files, Aura **procedurally synthesizes** its background focus sounds inside your browser:
*   🌧️ **Cosmic Rain**: Generates white noise and passes it through an automated LowPass BiquadFilter (cutoff: 850Hz) combined with a Peaking filter (350Hz) to simulate raindrop impact profiles.
*   🌀 **Deep Pink Noise**: Uses *Paul Kellet's refined pinking algorithm* to achieve a natural -3dB/octave slope, ideal for masking harsh background distractions.
*   🍃 **Forest Wind**: Pairs a narrow BandPass filter (Q: 2.0) with a slow-frequency Low-Frequency Oscillator (LFO running at 0.08Hz) to dynamically sweep frequency ranges by $\pm250\text{Hz}$, producing breeze rustles.
*   🔔 **Synthesized Chime**: An oscillator-based sine and triangle sweep triggered at the end of each session.

### 2. Pomodoro Focus Circle ⏱️
*   Displays a large countdown ring that shrinks dynamically as focus minutes decrease.
*   Includes presets for **Work Focus** (25 mins), **Short Break** (5 mins), and **Long Break** (15 mins).
*   Updates browser document tab titles dynamically so you can monitor time from other windows.

### 3. Kanban Task Board 📋
*   Sorts tasks automatically using weighted priority values (`High` / `Medium` / `Low`).
*   Features **Drag-and-Drop** support as well as quick click-to-move arrows.
*   Saves automatically to `localStorage` so your task boards persist across refreshes.

### 4. Reflective Journal & Mood Tracker ✍️
*   Log your emotional state (☀️ Radiant, 🍃 Peaceful, ⚡ Focused, ☁️ Tired, 🌧️ Stressed).
*   Saves text reflections and visual logs in a scrollable history timeline.
*   Updates the main dashboard with today's logged mood and quick text snippets.

---

> [!TIP]
> Keep the server running in the background. If you want to stop the server at any time, run: `manage_task kill` on task id `6b284218-b68c-4df8-b633-5aca70fd92a5/task-44`.

# Aura | Personal Productivity Sanctuary 🌌

**Aura** is a premium, glassmorphic single-page web application designed to enhance deep focus, structure task management, and track mental well-being. Built entirely with high-performance vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, it runs locally without external database or asset dependencies.

## 🔗 Access the Application

---

The project has been initialized in your workspace:
*   📂 [index.html](file:///C:/Users/NETCOM/agy-cli-projects/index.html) — Structural markup, semantic elements, modals, custom sliders.
*   📂 [styles.css](file:///C:/Users/NETCOM/agy-cli-projects/styles.css) — Design system, glassmorphism filters, keyframe-animated floating blobs, layout grid transformations.
*   📂 [app.js](file:///C:/Users/NETCOM/agy-cli-projects/app.js) — Keyboard hotkey listeners, task controller, local storage synchronization, Pomodoro countdown, and Web Audio API engine.
*   📂 [package.json](file:///C:/Users/NETCOM/agy-cli-projects/package.json) — Configuration for server running on port 3000.

---

## ⚡ Key UI/UX Systems

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Aura UI/UX Core] --> B[Collapsible Layout]
    A --> C[Keyboard Shortcuts]
    A --> D[Inline text editing]
    A --> E[Multi-dimensional Filters]
    A --> F[Custom Preset Sliders]
```

### 1. Collapsible Layout (Alt + B) 📐
*   The sidebar can be collapsed into a space-saving icon-only view using the toggle arrow or the keyboard shortcut.
*   Transitions are styled with smooth bezier curves (`cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)`) to slide seamlessly.

### 2. Physical-Style Keyboard Shortcuts ⌨️
Use key combos to navigate the application instantly:
*   <kbd>Alt</kbd> + <kbd>B</kbd> — Expand or collapse the sidebar.
*   <kbd>Alt</kbd> + <kbd>1</kbd> — Switch to **Dashboard** tab.
*   <kbd>Alt</kbd> + <kbd>2</kbd> — Switch to **Tasks** tab.
*   <kbd>Alt</kbd> + <kbd>3</kbd> — Switch to **Pomodoro** tab.
*   <kbd>Alt</kbd> + <kbd>4</kbd> — Switch to **Journal & Mood** tab.
*   <kbd>Spacebar</kbd> — Start or Pause the Pomodoro timer.
*   <kbd>Alt</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> — Reset the Pomodoro timer.

### 3. Inline Click-to-Edit Inputs ✏️
*   **Username Edit**: Double-click your name under your avatar in the sidebar footer to change it. Your profile, greeting titles, and headers will synchronize instantly.
*   **Task Title Edit**: Double-click any task title card on the Kanban board to edit it inline. Hitting `Enter` or clicking away saves it automatically.

### 4. Custom Pomodoro Presets ⏱️
*   Adjust work blocks and break intervals on the fly using responsive range sliders (from 1 to 90 minutes).
*   Any adjustment updates the active timers immediately.

### 5. Multi-dimensional Filtration & Board Maintenance 🧹
*   **Real-time Search**: Typing in the task search bar filters cards on the fly without refreshing the page.
*   **Priority Pills**: Filter tasks by High, Medium, or Low priority.
*   **Clean Board**: Use the "Clear Done" button to purge completed tasks with a single click.

---

## 🔊 Ambient Audio Synthesis Engine
*   🌧️ **Cosmic Rain**: Procedural white noise filtered through an automated LowPass filter (850Hz) and Peaking filter (350Hz).
*   🌀 **Deep Pink Noise**: Natural -3dB/octave noise generated mathematically to block distractions.
*   🍃 **Forest Wind**: Dynamic bandpass sweeps modulated by a slow-oscillator LFO (0.08Hz).

args.CodeContent:
# Aura | Personal Productivity Sanctuary 🌌

**Aura** is a premium, glassmorphic single-page web application designed to enhance deep focus, structure task management, and track mental well-being. Built entirely with high-performance vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, it runs locally without external database or asset dependencies.

## 🔗 Access the Application

The application is running live on your local machine:
👉 **[http://127.0.0.1:3000](http://127.0.0.1:3000)**

---

## 🛠️ File Structure

The project has been initialized in your workspace:
*   📂 [index.html](file:///C:/Users/NETCOM/agy-cli-projects/index.html) — Structural markup, modals, custom sliders, overlays, and mobile tabs.
*   📂 [styles.css](file:///C:/Users/NETCOM/agy-cli-projects/styles.css) — Design system, glassmorphism filters, responsive grid layout, and sliding drawer transitions.
*   📂 [app.js](file:///C:/Users/NETCOM/agy-cli-projects/app.js) — Keyboard hotkeys, task controller, local storage sync, Pomodoro countdown, and Web Audio API engine.
*   📂 [package.json](file:///C:/Users/NETCOM/agy-cli-projects/package.json) — Configuration for server running on port 3000.

---

## ⚡ Mobile & Responsive UI/UX Systems

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Aura Responsive Systems] --> B[Sliding Drawer Menu]
    A --> C[Mobile Segmented Columns]
    A --> D[Self-Calibrating SVGs]
    A --> E[Viewport Swell Adaptation]
```

### 1. Sliding Mobile Menu Drawer 📱
*   On screens `< 768px`, the sidebar slides off-screen (`transform: translateX(-100%)`).
*   A hamburger button is pinned floating on the top-left of the viewport.
*   Toggling it slides the sidebar drawer in from the left and activates a glassmorphic `.sidebar-overlay` mask that dims the background.
*   Selecting any tab closes the drawer automatically.

### 2. Segmented Kanban Column Tabs 📑
*   Stacking three long columns vertically on mobile screens results in scrolling fatigue.
*   To solve this, Aura switches to a **segmented tab control** on mobile (`To Do` | `In Progress` | `Completed`).
*   Only the active column is rendered, keeping the viewport clean.

### 3. Self-Calibrating Progress Rings 📐
*   Rather than hardcoding circle stroke offsets (circumference: $2 \pi r$), Aura reads geometry attributes dynamically (`baseVal.value`).
*   Whether the timer circle scale shrinks to $r=100$ on mobile or stays at $r=120$ on desktop, the progress rings animate smoothly.

---

## ⌨️ Desktop Keyboard Shortcuts
*   <kbd>Alt</kbd> + <kbd>B</kbd> — Expand / collapse sidebar (desktop) or slide drawer (mobile).
*   <kbd>Alt</kbd> + <kbd>1</kbd> — Switch to **Dashboard** tab.
*   <kbd>Alt</kbd> + <kbd>2</kbd> — Switch to **Tasks** tab.
*   <kbd>Alt</kbd> + <kbd>3</kbd> — Switch to **Pomodoro** tab.
*   <kbd>Alt</kbd> + <kbd>4</kbd> — Switch to **Journal** tab.
*   <kbd>Spacebar</kbd> — Start / Pause Pomodoro timer.
*   <kbd>Alt</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> — Reset Pomodoro timer.

---

> [!TIP]
> Keep the server running in the background. If you want to stop the server at any time, run: `manage_task kill` on task id `6b284218-b68c-4df8-b633-5aca70fd92a5/task-84`.

| **`always-proceed`** | Auto-approves all actions. The AI will write code, run commands, and install packages autonomously without prompting you. | **Highest** ⚠️ | Only use in dedicated, trusted workspace folders where you want 100% hands-free execution. |
| **`strict`** | Strict validation of sandbox boundaries. Denies or prompts for almost all tool calls, even minor reads/writes. | **None** | For high-security environments where you want to minimize any agentic actions. |
